articles.title: USA vs. Australia takeaways: Winners of Group D, USMNT is redefining World Cup expectations — 'There's something about this one that feels different' - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Make no mistake: This is not normal.

articles.author: Jeff Carlisle
articles.title: U.S. coach Pochettino pleased with 'fantastic' Pepi, Balogun pairing - ESPN
articles.description: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino praised his side's tactical flexibility in defeating Australia 2-0 at Lumen Field on Friday, saying they were "fantastic" in clinching a spot in the knockout rounds of the World Cup.
